name: GetBusContext
title: GetBusContext
description: Returns the current bus context of the CAPL block.
This is an example for a simulation node.Test nodes should copy the bus context to a CAPL variable in the Main() function because all global variables are cleared when the test module is started.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
